extraction.ocr_text:
Agent tool                                                                 ✓ Successful

Get Approved Invoices

This workflow retrieves JSON objects of Invoices from Data Fabric entity Payments Queue, after they were
approved by process business user and added by Accounts Payable automation.

Show less  ^

Agent tool                                                                 ✓ Successful

Get ServiceNow Incident Notes

This workflow retrieves comments and work notes for a ServiceNow Incident. Input is Incident ID, outputs is JSON
object containing full incident details and string of comments.

Show less  ^

Agent tool                                                                 ✓ Successful

Get ServiceNow Incidents

This workflow retrieves ServiceNow incidents based on Keyword (filter applied to Short Description field) and how
many days ago tickets were created. Response contains JSON object with list of key ticket fields.

Show less  ^

Agent tool

Post ServiceNow Incident Note

This workflow adds a comment to ServiceNow incident. Inputs include Incident Number (not Incident ID), comment
text and whether comment internal or external. Output is comments after addition.

Show less  ^

✕ Reject    ✓ Accept
extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Agent Builder or Studio Web agent configuration/testing interface displaying a list of available Agent tools. Several tools are expanded, with three marked as Successful, and the bottom tool, Post ServiceNow Incident Note, is awaiting approval. The Accept button is highlighted, indicating the user is expected to approve this tool/action.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Review the expanded Agent tool details for "Post ServiceNow Incident Note".
2. Click on the highlighted "Accept" button to approve the tool/action.
3. If you do not want to approve it, click on "Reject" instead.

layout.rationale: High density (1233 chars) + wide (1.01) or very high text
